# zstack_database_backup (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage database backups in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `backup_storage_uuid` (String) The UUID of the backup storage.
- `name` (String) The name of the database backup.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the database backup.

### Read-Only

- `metadata` (String) The metadata of the database backup.
- `size` (Number) The size of the database backup in bytes.
- `state` (String) The state of the database backup.
- `status` (String) The status of the database backup.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the database backup.
